name: punch-collision-recovery
description: Verify preflight penetration planning stops a weak lunge before an unbroken depth block without camera-breaking rollback.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local hum=p.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") root.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-33),Vector3.new(-2,3,-100)) p:SetAttribute("LastWallHit",0) local before=root.Position local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") local overlap=OverlapParams.new() overlap.FilterType=Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include overlap.FilterDescendantsInstances={workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Blocks"]} local stuck=0 for _,b in ipairs(workspace:GetPartBoundsInBox(root.CFrame,Vector3.new(2.8,5,2.8),overlap)) do if b.CanCollide and not b:GetAttribute("Broken") then stuck+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,corrected=r.collisionCorrected,raw=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchRawLungeDistance"),safe=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchSafeTravel"),correction=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchCollisionCorrectionStuds"),overlapCount=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchCollisionOverlapCount"),stuck=stuck,moved=(root.Position-before).Magnitude,velocity=root.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Magnitude,platform=hum.PlatformStand,sit=hum.Sit,state=hum:GetState().Name})

steps.label: weak punch stops before the blocking collider
